load-pdf-verify-page-count.title: Load PDF and Verify Page Count using PdfFileInfo
load-pdf-verify-page-count.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file with the PdfFileInfo facade, retrieving the underlying Document object, and confirming successful loading by checking that the document contains at least one page.

check-pdf-encryption-and-encrypt-decrypt.title: Check PDF Encryption and Perform Encrypt/Decrypt
check-pdf-encryption-and-encrypt-decrypt.description: Demonstrates how to inspect a PDF's IsEncrypted flag with PdfFileInfo and then encrypt or decrypt the document using the Document API based on that status.

decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password using Aspose.Pdf
decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.description: Shows how to unlock and decrypt an encrypted PDF file by providing the owner password with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

encrypt-pdf-256-aes.title: Encrypt PDF with 256‑bit AES and passwords
encrypt-pdf-256-aes.description: Shows how to encrypt an existing PDF using 256‑bit AES, set user and owner passwords, allow printing, and save the protected document.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-40.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-rc4-40.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF file with the RC4‑40 algorithm and a user password using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-custom-privileges.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Custom Privileges
encrypt-pdf-aes256-custom-privileges.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 while applying a custom set of document privileges (allow printing, forbid copying and modifications) in a single operation.

change-user-password-of-encrypted-pdf.title: Change User Password of Encrypted PDF
change-user-password-of-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to change the user password of an already encrypted PDF while keeping the original owner password and encryption settings using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-owner-password-pdf.title: Update Owner Password of Encrypted PDF
update-owner-password-pdf.description: Shows how to change the owner password of a protected PDF while keeping the existing user password and permissions unchanged using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

change-user-and-owner-passwords.title: Change User and Owner Passwords in PDF
change-user-and-owner-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to change both the user and owner passwords of an existing PDF in a single call using the PdfFileSecurity.ChangePassword overload.

set-pdf-privileges-allow-printing-only.title: Set PDF Privileges to Allow Printing Only
set-pdf-privileges-allow-printing-only.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity to enable printing while disabling copying, then save the secured PDF.

set-pdf-privileges-allow-form-filling-di.title: Allow Form Filling and Disable Assembly in PDF
set-pdf-privileges-allow-form-filling-di.description: The example demonstrates how to apply document privileges to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, enabling form filling while disabling document assembly.

disable-copying-enable-printing-pdf.title: Disable Copying While Enabling Printing for PDF
disable-copying-enable-printing-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity to allow printing but prevent content copying in a PDF document.

remove-usage-rights-from-signed-pdf.title: Remove Usage Rights from Signed PDF
remove-usage-rights-from-signed-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a signed PDF, check for embedded usage rights, remove them, and save the resulting document using Aspose.Pdf.

check-pdf-extended-usage-rights.title: Check PDF for Extended Usage Rights
check-pdf-extended-usage-rights.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, bind it to the PdfFileSignature facade, and determine whether the document contains extended usage rights using ContainsUsageRights.

remove-usage-rights-verify.title: Remove Usage Rights and Verify Removal from PDF
remove-usage-rights-verify.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, remove its usage rights using the PdfFileSignature facade, verify the removal with ContainsUsageRights, and save the updated document.

encrypt-pdf-with-exception-handling.title: Encrypt PDF with Detailed Exception Handling
encrypt-pdf-with-exception-handling.description: Demonstrates how to enable AllowExceptions on PdfFileSecurity, attempt PDF encryption with TryEncryptFile, and retrieve detailed error information via LastException.

modify-pdf-privileges.title: Modify PDF Privileges Using PdfFileSecurity
modify-pdf-privileges.description: Demonstrates how to change PDF security privileges (e.g., allow printing) with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade. The example creates a PDF, binds it, sets a privilege, and saves the result.

encrypt-pdf-to-memory-stream.title: Encrypt PDF and Save to MemoryStream
encrypt-pdf-to-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying AES‑128 encryption with user/owner passwords and specific permissions, and writing the encrypted document to a MemoryStream for network transmission.

encrypt-pdf-byte-array.title: Encrypt PDF Byte Array with Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-byte-array.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, encrypting it with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity, and returning the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-password-only.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only
encrypt-pdf-with-user-password-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades by providing only a user password (owner password left undefined) and applying 256‑bit encryption with selected privileges.

apply-password-protection-to-pdf.title: Apply Password Protection to PDF Using PdfFileSecurity
apply-password-protection-to-pdf.description: Shows how to encrypt an existing PDF with user and owner passwords using the PdfFileSecurity facade, avoiding the creation of a Document object.

retrieve-pdf-encryption-algorithm.title: Retrieve PDF Encryption Algorithm
retrieve-pdf-encryption-algorithm.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reads the CryptoAlgorithm property, and displays the encryption algorithm or indicates the document is not encrypted.

validate-pdf-encryption-before-decryptio.title: Validate PDF Encryption Before Decryption
validate-pdf-encryption-before-decryptio.description: Demonstrates how to check if a PDF is encrypted using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and, if so, decrypt it with a password while avoiding unnecessary exceptions.

batch-encrypt-pdfs.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with User and Owner Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf by applying the same user and owner passwords with AES‑256 protection. The code iterates through each PDF, saves the encrypted copy to an output directory, and enables printing.

batch-decrypt-pdfs-from-config.title: Batch Decrypt PDFs Using Owner Passwords from Config
batch-decrypt-pdfs-from-config.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON configuration file and batch‑decrypt multiple PDF files using their owner passwords with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-update-pdf-user-passwords.title: Batch Update PDF User Passwords
batch-update-pdf-user-passwords.description: Iterates through all PDF files in a folder and applies a standardized user password to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

change-pdf-owner-password-preserve-user.title: Change PDF Owner Password While Preserving User Password
change-pdf-owner-password-preserve-user.description: Shows how to iterate over multiple PDF files and update their owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, keeping the existing user passwords unchanged.

encrypt-pdfs-by-filename-algorithm.title: Encrypt PDFs Using Naming Convention to Select Algorithm
encrypt-pdfs-by-filename-algorithm.description: The example scans a folder of PDF files, determines the encryption algorithm and key size from each file's name, and encrypts the documents with the chosen settings using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

generate-encryption-usage-report.title: Generate Encryption Usage Report for PDFs
generate-encryption-usage-report.description: Iterates over a collection of PDF files, uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to determine if each document is encrypted, and writes a text report showing the encryption status and algorithm information availability.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-allow-print-edit.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑128 and Allow Print/Edit Permissions
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-allow-print-edit.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, combine privilege settings to allow printing and content modification, and then encrypt the document using RC4‑128 with Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-annotation-to-encrypted-pdf.title: Add Text Annotation to Encrypted PDF
add-text-annotation-to-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with optional owner password handling, adding a text annotation to the first page, and saving the modified document.

encrypt-decrypt-pdf-verify-integrity.title: Encrypt and Decrypt PDF to Verify Integrity
encrypt-decrypt-pdf-verify-integrity.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity, then decrypting it and performing a simple round‑trip integrity check.

encrypt-pdfs-with-performance-timing.title: Encrypt PDFs with Performance Timing
encrypt-pdfs-with-performance-timing.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade while measuring and logging the time taken for each encryption operation.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-to-cloud.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Write to Cloud Stream
encrypt-pdf-aes256-to-cloud.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to encrypt a PDF with AES‑256 and directly save the encrypted file to a cloud storage stream.

change-pdf-passwords-from-csv.title: Change PDF User and Owner Passwords from CSV
change-pdf-passwords-from-csv.description: Demonstrates how to read a CSV list of PDFs and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to change both the user and owner passwords, saving the secured files to new locations.

encrypt-pdf-stream-rc4-40.title: Encrypt PDF Stream with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-stream-rc4-40.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF from a stream, apply RC4‑40 encryption with user/owner passwords, and return the encrypted PDF as a new stream using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-pdf-encryption-summary.title: Generate PDF Encryption Summary CSV
generate-pdf-encryption-summary.description: Scans a folder of PDF files, detects each file’s encryption status, algorithm (if known), and document privileges, and writes the results to a CSV summary file.

verify-decryption-fails-incorrect-owner-.title: Verify Decryption Fails with Incorrect Owner Password
verify-decryption-fails-incorrect-owner-.description: Creates a PDF, encrypts it with a known owner password, then attempts decryption using a wrong owner password and checks that the operation fails.
